snapshot.content: Cycle 272 (execution): Decomposed 'First external mention' goal into 6 tasks and completed task 1 — researched 12 external venues for project mentions. Top target is e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents (27K stars) with clear PR submission process. Also identified jim-schwoebel/awesome_ai_agents (1.7K stars), self-evolving agents list (2.1K stars), Claude-specific lists, and non-GitHub directories.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Prepare pitch materials then submit PR to e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents awesome-list.
